title: Code not functioning in Weweb HTML element
symptom: The code works in an HTML editor but fails to execute when pasted into a Weweb HTML element.
applies_when: Using custom JavaScript code in Weweb
not_this_if: Code works in other environments or frameworks
root_cause: Weweb uses a different context for DOM manipulation, requiring the use of its library functions instead of standard JavaScript document methods. The standard 'document' object is not accessible in the same way as in a typical HTML environment.
fix_steps: Replace all instances of 'document' in your code with 'wwLib.getFrontDocument()'.
Ensure that the code is executed in the appropriate lifecycle method, such as 'on mounted'.
Test the code again in the Weweb environment.
agent_instruction: Modify the code to use 'wwLib.getFrontDocument()' instead of 'document'.
